channel.title: pigz on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in pigz on IT notes

item.title: pigz
item.description: To compress using gzip format but using all your available cores: tar --use-compress-program=pigz -cf archive.tgz /path/to/source Or if you want to pipe it: tar -cf - source | pigz > archive.tgz To decompress use tar -xvf archive.tgz as usual. The output of pigz is compatible with gzip
